summary: Iteration 85: BIQc Homepage Visual System Complete Testing - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Tested animated orange galaxy background, hero rotator with navigation arrows, integration carousel with SVG brand logos, 4-tier intelligence diagram with BIQc core node glow, stats section, CTA buttons, navigation links, Trust dropdown, and footer. Page is fully scrollable with proper layout.

tests: Hero section renders with data-testid='hero-section'
Energy Galaxy Background canvas (data-testid='energy-galaxy-bg') renders with 1920x950 dimensions
Hero viewport with rotating text (data-testid='hero-viewport') renders
Hero navigation arrows (data-testid='hero-prev', data-testid='hero-next') work - text rotates on click
Hero CTA button (data-testid='hero-cta') renders and navigates to /register-supabase
Protect/Stabilise/Strengthen block visible with orange checkmarks
Australian Owned & Operated trust badge visible
Intelligence diagram section (data-testid='intelligence-diagram') renders
4-tier flow visible: Business Signals → Watchtower → BIQc Core → Decision Support
BIQc Core Node (data-testid='biqc-core-node') renders with animated glow halo
Signal lines with animated connectors visible
Finance/Operations/Sales systems cards with tool tags render
Integration carousel section (data-testid='integration-carousel') renders

SVG brand logos render for HubSpot, Salesforce, Xero, Stripe, Slack, Google, Shopify, QuickBooks, Notion, Microsoft, AWS, DocuSign, Snowflake, Tableau, Monday, Asana, Zoom, Dropbox, Zendesk, Mailchimp, Pipedrive
Brand logos display with correct brand colors (not generic)
Two-row scrolling animation (25s duration) running
Carousel pause on hover implemented via CSS animation-play-state
Logo cards have hover effect (orange background highlight via CSS)
Stats section (data-testid='stats-section') renders
Shows 5 metrics: 40% Operational Improvement, 50% Reduced Manual Work, 80% Lower Processing Costs, 3x Faster Anomaly Detection, -25% Fewer Preventable Errors
Cognition section (data-testid='cognition-section') renders
6 glass cards with icons: Monitors Everything, Detects & Flags, Prevents & Corrects, Executive Briefings, Australian Sovereign, Maximise Output
Bottom CTA section (data-testid='cta-section') renders
CTA button (data-testid='bottom-cta') clickable and navigates to /register-supabase
'Stop reacting. Start preventing.' headline visible
Website nav (data-testid='website-nav') renders with fixed position
Nav Login (data-testid='nav-login') navigates to /login-supabase
Nav Get Started (data-testid='nav-get-started') renders
Trust dropdown opens and shows all 7 trust items
Website footer (data-testid='website-footer') renders
Product, Legal, Company sections with links visible
BIQc branding and Australian Sovereign Data badge present
Page fully scrollable - total height 4742px
All 7 sections verified: hero-section, intelligence-diagram, stats-section, integration-carousel, cognition-section, cta-section, website-footer
No JavaScript errors during rendering
No broken layout or missing content

visual_verification.animated_background: Orange galaxy intelligence field with neural energy threads, particle field, and central glow convergence working
visual_verification.brand_logos: Real SVG brand logos with brand colors (HubSpot #FF7A59, Salesforce #00A1E0, Xero #13B5EA, Stripe #635BFF, etc.)
visual_verification.carousel_animation: 25 second loop duration, pause on hover via CSS
visual_verification.biqc_core_halo: Animated pulsing glow with orange radial gradient
visual_verification.hero_rotation: 8 second auto-rotate with fade transitions, arrow navigation working

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
SVG brand logos are custom-built (not Clearbit API) with accurate brand colors
Canvas-based EnergyGalaxyBackground performs well with requestAnimationFrame
Carousel CSS animation with hover pause correctly implemented
Minor ESLint warnings for missing useCallback/useEffect dependencies - not blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage visual rebuild complete and fully tested. All components render correctly: EnergyGalaxyBackground (canvas animation), LiquidSteelHeroRotator (8s auto-rotate with arrows), IntegrationCarousel (25s animation with brand SVG logos), IntelligenceDiagram (4-tier flow with BIQc core glow), Stats, Cognition cards, CTA, and Footer. Navigation links work. No backend APIs used on homepage.

mocked_api_confirmation.note: Homepage is static marketing page - no API calls required
